evidence.claim: TSMC dominates over 90% of advanced node manufacturing (<5nm) worldwide.
EUV supplier concentration remains high with ASML as the sole provider.
Advanced packaging (CoWoS) capacity is the current bottleneck for AI accelerators.

what_could_weaken_view: Geopolitical escalation in the Taiwan Strait disrupts fabs.
Rapid progress of Intel 18A or Samsung Foundry captures substantial market share.
Alternative packaging technologies bypass the need for CoWoS.
